meta.title: Public Offer
meta.description: Terms of the purchase and sale agreement for WAYYOUCHOOSE jewelry

intro: This document is a public offer from the WAYYOUCHOOSE online store (hereinafter — the Seller) — a proposal to conclude a purchase and sale agreement for jewelry on the terms set out below. Placing an order on the website constitutes unconditional acceptance of this offer.

1.heading: 1. SUBJECT OF THE AGREEMENT
1.body: The Seller undertakes to transfer ownership of jewelry made of gold 585°/750°, silver 925°, platinum 950° and precious stones to the Buyer in accordance with the order, and the Buyer — to accept and pay for the goods under the terms of this agreement. Product specifications (metal, stones, weight, size) are listed on the relevant product page.

2.heading: 2. ORDER PROCESS
2.body: Orders are placed through the website by adding items to the cart and filling in a form with contact details and delivery address. After placing an order, the Buyer receives a confirmation to the provided email address. The Seller reserves the right to contact the Buyer to clarify order details before dispatch.

3.heading: 3. PRICE AND PAYMENT
3.body: Product prices are listed on the website in Ukrainian hryvnias (UAH) including VAT. The Seller reserves the right to change prices without prior notice; the price at the time of ordering is final. Payment options: online — via LiqPay or WayForPay (Visa/Mastercard); cash on delivery — upon receipt at a Nova Poshta branch (delivery service fees are paid by the Buyer).

4.heading: 4. DELIVERY
4.body: Delivery is available throughout Ukraine. Delivery methods: Nova Poshta (1–3 business days); Ukrposhta (3–7 business days); courier delivery in Kyiv and partner cities (arranged separately). Dispatch time — 1–2 business days after payment confirmation. Delivery cost is calculated at checkout. Risk of accidental loss or damage passes to the Buyer upon receipt.

5.heading: 5. RETURNS AND EXCHANGES
5.body: Returns and exchanges are accepted in accordance with the Law of Ukraine «On Consumer Rights Protection» within 14 days of receipt. Conditions: the item has not been used, original packaging and tags are intact, proof of purchase is provided. Jewelry made or customized to individual order (personalized size, engraving) is not eligible for return or exchange. Return shipping costs are borne by the Buyer unless the return is due to a manufacturing defect.

6.heading: 6. WARRANTY
6.body: All products come with a 12-month warranty from the date of receipt. The warranty covers manufacturing defects: broken clasps, detached elements, stone defects from factory processing. The warranty does not cover mechanical damage, deformation due to improper use, or natural surface wear. Warranty service is provided at our atelier in Kyiv or by mail.

7.heading: 7. LIABILITY OF THE PARTIES
7.body: The Seller is not liable for delivery delays caused by the delivery service or force majeure circumstances (military actions, natural disasters, government decisions). If an order cannot be fulfilled for reasons beyond the Seller's control, the Buyer will receive a full refund within 5 business days.
